creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Upstream released a hotfix version called 1.21.1 however looking at commit history in master branch it seems to have been reverted shortly after so hold off with 1.21.1 for now until the situation is clear.

Source:
https://github.com/netdata/netdata/commit/983a26d1a2c110b35db252b4b79c3f03eb4eeb4b
